problem id: f30b205e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  01101110 -> 11001110
  11110010 -> 01011001
  11101100 -> 10011010
  10001110 -> 11010101
  00000111 -> 11100000
  11011011 -> 01111101
  01111110 -> 11001100
  10100111 -> 11110001
  11011110 -> 11011101
  01110001 -> 00101101

query: 01001100
predicted answer: 10001011
